languages.text: Последняя просьба Эоганна. Молчание сервочерепа полнится горечью неописуемой утраты.
Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.
languages.original_text: Последняя просьба Эоганна. Молчание сервочерепа полнится горечью неописуемой утраты.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

languages.text: La última petición de Eogunn. El silencio del servocráneo está repleto de la amargura de una pérdida indescriptible.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: La última petición de Eogunn. El silencio del servocráneo está repleto de la amargura de una pérdida indescriptible.

languages.text: La dernière volonté d'Eogunn. Le silence du servocrâne est chargé d'amertume, comme s'il avait vécu une perte indescriptible.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: La dernière volonté d'Eogunn. Le silence du servocrâne est chargé d'amertume, comme s'il avait vécu une perte indescriptible.

languages.text: 伊奥贡的最后请求。伺服头骨的沉默中，满载难以言表的苦涩失落。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡的最后请求。伺服头骨的沉默中，满载难以言表的苦涩失落。

languages.text: Eogunns letzter Wunsch. Das Schweigen des Servoschädels zeugt von der Bitterkeit eines unbeschreiblichen Verlustes.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: Eogunns letzter Wunsch. Das Schweigen des Servoschädels zeugt von der Bitterkeit eines unbeschreiblichen Verlustes.

languages.text: Eogunn'un son arzusu. Hizmeletin sessizliği, tarifsiz bir kaybın burukluğunu taşıyor.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un son arzusu. Hizmeletin sessizliği, tarifsiz bir kaybın burukluğunu taşıyor.

languages.text: エオガンの最後の願い。サーヴォスカルの沈黙は、言葉に尽くせぬ喪失の苦さで、重く沈んでいる。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.

traits.locale_text: エオガンの最後の願い。サーヴォスカルの沈黙は、言葉に尽くせぬ喪失の苦さで、重く沈んでいる。
